name: Meat Loaf Tropicale
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine all ingredients except bacon and marmalade in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture into an ungreased loaf pan, measuring 9 x 5 x 3 inches.
4. Place crisscrossed bacon slices on top of the meat mixture.
5. Spread the marmalade evenly over the entire loaf.
6. Bake, uncovered, for one to one and a quarter hours.
7. Allow excess fat to drain off before slicing.
